title: Sayonee
overview: When Mahi, fiancee of national shooting gold medalist Rajdeep Randhava, goes missing in Russia, Randhava must put his life at stake and take on conjuring gypsies, corrupt indo-eruo cops, pythoned assassins, butcher smugglers and the Russian Brathva mafia all alone to find the truth behind Mahi's disappearance.
